creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Grzegorz Blach <magik@roorback.net> -----

Date: Tue, 12 Jun 2012 13:31:18 +0200
From: Grzegorz Blach <magik@roorback.net>
To: Max Brazhnikov <makc@freebsd.org>
Subject: Re: ports/167405: EFL updated to 1.1.0 and E17 updated to svn 65643

I've updated again http://files.roorback.net/e17/diffs/all.diff

1. In benchmarks/expedite I added --disable-* to CONFIGURE_ARGS, for
sure, but this shouldn't change anything

2. Added BROKEN messages to 4 ports which fails, all of them has set
EXPIRATION_DATE

3. Changed EXPIRATION_DATE to 2012-07-31

4. Updated LIB_DEPENDS on graphics/png after last libpng update


Macro ${MASTER_SITES_E17} isn't needed, because In EFL 1.2.1 I've
planned to use http://files.roorback.net/e17/base/ without date in url
Also In EFL 1.2.1 I've planned to convert ports to optionsNG framework.

----- End forwarded message -----
